sources.label: LastSticker - Panini FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 (Standard Edition)
sources.notes: Designated canonical checklist for the 670-sticker Standard Edition; codes follow its scheme (Team Photo = #1, Team Logo Foil = #2, players #3-20). The page renders its checklist via a dynamic table that was not directly machine-readable on fetch, so individual rows were enumerated and reconciled against the cross-check sources below, which use the identical Standard-Edition numbering.

sources.label: The Cardboard Connection - 2022 Panini World Cup Stickers Qatar Checklist
sources.notes: Full published Standard-Edition checklist used to enumerate every code, player and section. States 670 stickers incl. 50 foils; 18 base + Team Photo + Team Logo Foil per team.

sources.label: eBay singles listing 334547940622 (Group A & B foils + team singles)
sources.notes: Independent confirmation of opener (FWC1-18), FIFA Museum (FWC19+) and per-team 1-20 layout (e.g. NED3-NED20, ENG1 Team Shot / ENG2 Team Logo).

sources.label: Football Cartophilic Info Exchange - Panini FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 checklist
sources.notes: Confirms 670 = Oryx/Standard album size and documents that an alternate (638-sticker) regional numbering exists; the alternate scheme was deliberately NOT used.

excludedItems: Base Update Set (79 stickers) - separate update release
Coca-Cola Team Believers Brazil insert (8 stickers, C1-C8) - promotional
DFB Germany online bundle insert (27 stickers, DFB1-DFB27) - regional/online exclusive
Extra Stickers - Legends & Rookies (20 stickers, 1:190) - special insert, no standard album space
